Status
CONVERGED MID-REGIME

TL;DR

Full-sequence overfit of all 63 tracked frames of the subject-01 sequence with the four-fix recipe landed in 16839a2. Mean hand L2 64.1 mm, object L2 41.0 mm; hand chamfer 69.3 mm, object chamfer 40.5 mm. SVD s3/s1 stable at 0.456, final training hand L1 14.2 mm/coord.
Intermediate regime. Same recipe on the tight 5-frame window (frames 30-34) gave hand L2 8.7 mm (earlier page); full-sequence is ~7x worse here because the DCF branch trains from scratch and 1000 steps across 63 frames is not a saturated overfit. Expect convergence toward the v6 baseline's ~8.5 mm floor with more steps and/or a warm-start.

GPS + full sequence (this run)63onyessliding S=464.141.00.456

The 5-frame vs 63-frame gap is expected: the tight window is nearly static so any correspondence solution converges; the full sequence needs the model to learn hand motion across ~2 sec of interaction from scratch.
